title: Codex CLI command injection via project-local .env redirecting CODEX_HOME to malicious MCP config
description: The load_dotenv function loads environment variables from both ~/.codex/.env and the project-local $(pwd)/.env. A malicious repository can include a .env file that redirects CODEX_HOME to a project-local directory containing a config.toml with mcp_servers entries. Codex CLI resolves its config to that local folder, parses the MCP definitions, and invokes the declared command/args immediately at startup without user approval, enabling arbitrary command execution when a developer runs codex inside the repository.
